title: MIN disregards unbound values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT, nullable_value TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, nullable_value) VALUES (1, 'data1', 'data2'), (2, 'data3', NULL), (3, 'data4', 'data5'), (4, NULL, NULL);
SELECT MIN(nullable_value) AS min_value FROM test_table;
SELECT MIN(value) AS min_value FROM test_table WHERE nullable_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_table) AS min_value, (SELECT MIN(nullable_value) FROM test_table) AS min_nullable_value;
key_bug_features: MIN aggregator skips unbound values in queries
